Jwt.//: DEVELOPMENT KEY — published in source control. Program.cs refuses to boot any
Jwt.//2: non-Development environment with this value. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 64

Cors.//: Empty here on purpose: Development falls back to localhost:3000 / localhost:5173, and a
Cors.//2: non-Development environment must set Cors__AllowedOrigins__0 (and __1) or the API refuses
Cors.//3: to start. Wildcards are illegal — the policy allows credentials.

RateLimiting.//: Fixed windows, partitioned by authenticated user id when present, client IP otherwise.
RateLimiting.//2: Tune per environment via RateLimiting__Auth__PermitLimit etc. Set Enabled=false to run
RateLimiting.//3: the k6 load test in load/ without being throttled.

ReverseProxy.//: Enable ONLY when a trusted proxy (Caddy) terminates every request. Trusting
ReverseProxy.//2: X-Forwarded-For with no proxy in front lets clients spoof their IP past the rate limiter.
